title: taraxacum stenocephalum subsp. magnum
intro: Taraxacum stenocephalum subsp. magnum is a subspecies of the dandelion plant, characterized by its larger flowers and leaves compared to other dandelion varieties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenocephalum subsp. magnum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
